frontmatter.title: Comparative Security Analysis of ChatGPT and Stack Overflow

node.html: Conducted a comparative analysis of ChatGPT and Stack Overflow for security-related programming queries using PMD tools. Analyzed 953 code examples, revealing ChatGPT’s higher rate of security violations (70%) compared to Stack Overflow (18%). Stack Overflow responses were preferred in 76% of cases, highlighting AI limitations in security.

To effectively preserve statistics from leakage, this study analyzes a novel framework using differential privacy (DP), in which synthetic noises are provided to parameters on the customers' side prior to aggregation, FLAG noise (FL with noise aggregated).The system analyses the dataset consisting of information about the client. Federated learning with Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) algorithm and Differential privacy is then applied. It is found that the Federated learning model have better privacy than the Differential privacy model and gives the accuracy of 97.3%.

Evaluated various dataset to show that Distributed Backdoor attacks is the most effective of all backdoor attacks. Implemented RONI and TRIM algorithm to prevent the same and found that TRIM achieves lower MSE than those of unpoisoned models by 6.42%.

frontmatter.title: Covid-19: Comparison of Time Series Forecasting Models and Hybrid ARIMA-ANN

node.html: This paper provides a hybrid methodology that incorporates both ARIMA and ANN models to take advantage of the unique characteristics of ARIMA and ANN models in linear and nonlinear modelling. The Hybrid model showed better accuracy and a root mean square error of 21,267 which is the lowest among other models compared.

Used OpenAI’s Gym in python to provide the related environment. Implemented and compared SARSA, Neural network and Q-learning for the self-driving agent to pick-up passengers and drop them off at the destination in the least amount of moves. Observed that Q-Learning produced the best results.
Developed the official website of Kilig Events (Madurai, India- based event management company) using React and hosted the website with effective SEO.
